name: bootstrap-workflow-agents
description: Team workflow skills (brief, design, review, plan, build, QA, ship, debug, drift, autonomous delivery) for Codex, OpenCode, and other agent runtimes.

interface.longDescription: Structured team workflow skills for turning ambiguous work into scoped briefs, designs, review findings, implementation plans, coordinated builds, QA passes, and shipping evidence — for Codex, OpenCode, and other agent runtimes.
defaultPrompt: Run the team workflow for this feature.
Review this design and turn it into a build plan.
QA the current diff and tell me what is unsafe.
